tasks.label: db: up
tasks.detail: Start the dev SQL Server (persistent named volume, pinned image, arm64 colima precheck). On first run it prompts for an SA password and saves it to a gitignored .env; or run 'dev: init secrets' first.

tasks.label: db: down
tasks.detail: Stop and remove the dev SQL Server container (data volume kept).

tasks.label: dev: init secrets
tasks.detail: Idempotent one-time bootstrap: ensures the .env SA password and the Jwt:Key + ConnectionStrings:Kernel user-secrets so the server boots.

tasks.label: db: migrate
tasks.detail: Apply EF migrations to the dev database (idempotent).

tasks.label: server
tasks.detail: Run the .NET API host (background; ready on 'Now listening on'; port 5080).

tasks.label: client
tasks.detail: Run the Vite dev server (background; ready on 'Local:'; port 5173).

tasks.label: Kernel: Stop All
tasks.command: scripts/db-down.sh; pkill -f 'Kernel.Api' 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -f 'vite' 2>/dev/null || true; echo 'Stopped db, server, client.'
tasks.detail: Remove the db container (volume kept) and stop the server + client processes.

tasks.label: test: all
tasks.detail: Run the .NET test tiers (Docker must be running for the integration tier).

tasks.label: client: verify
tasks.detail: tsc + vitest + eslint for the client.

tasks.label: e2e: harness + smoke
tasks.detail: Out-of-process e2e (TEST-2): db up + migrate, boot the server, drive every client service via npm (completeness self-audit), then boot the ACTUAL composed entrypoint (UI-5 smoke), then tear down.
